reply.text: My focus just quit and left me no severance

messages.text: not the focus quitting over a wall 😭
listen that ladder and shirt unionized against me
unionized is crazy, they got better benefits than you
they get front row seats and zero responsibilities
sounds like your last relationship actually
accurate, except the ladder never texted back
thats cause ladder has standards and balance
you love the sound of you
mine is you in that oversized paint armor
armor is wild, this is my paint nightgown
nightgown got more plot than netflix fr
and still you watched the wall, tragic behavior
i was pretending to care about the color
ok art critic, what color is my patience
let me take you out this week
